reviews.author: Swetha
reviews.review_body: I have joined my son in 2020, The school is having good standard regarding education but they don't have play ground ,and there is no inter school competitions , I feel they should keep sports inter school competitions for extra curricular activities and some clubs related to activities .They are  trying their best to make the kids active all the time ,engaged some how by conducting elocutions of science project, English, Hindi, telugu .They have little space for ground which they use for bus parking .They use the terrice , cellar ground floor space for extra curricular activities..they include 1activity everyday like karate , yoga, skating, pottery ,origami, chess,etc they take them to swimming during summer at nearby seasons swimming pool , batminton they take them to Game point near the school.

reviews.author: మస్తీపుర్ జక్కుల రాజు తెలంగాణా ఉద్యమకారుడు2007
reviews.review_body: Hi good all this school Best Things About the School Life for Students. School Life is the best time of our life as we make new friends, learn new edition. Teaching office responding care of children.  Most of house education.

reviews.author: Gaurav Mishra
reviews.review_body:
Bitter-sweet-bitter experience ,  in very initial calls where we were trying to fix appointments with Principal for Admission confirmation, We were pushing for Appointment to complete process and we got message from Admin " Maam is not free today, if you have so hurry you can look at some other school"
We recorded that call , it was such a bad experience .

This was our first week admission experience.

Eventually we took admission and paid 10k for admission deposit after Principal maam convinced us , after a couple of months i was looking for refund due to transfer but they have rule ( minimum of 1 year study ) to get deposit back

Please choose schools wisely !!

reviews.author: Sailaja Y
reviews.review_body:
Even though I didn't take admission in GlobalEdge because of some personal reasons, I have done good ground work to join my son in this school. To start with, I have visited thier branch couple of times for the admission enquiry and for the assessment.

The staff is very helpful and responsive.
Answered all my questions with patience. And the kid assessment was really very good. After the assessment we were asked to meet principal, and we loved the interaction with her, she has a clear view of the goals of school.

I totally recommend GlobalEdge.

reviews.review_body:
Can be say as one the best school in Madhapur
and
teaching wise is very better than most of international schools

reviews.author: Susri Mulukalapelly
reviews.review_body: Not a educational institution, it's corporate organization.

reviews.author: manjunath ps
reviews.review_body:
Global edge madhapur is a very good educational institution.
After relocating from Bangalore we were  apprehensive of shifting from state syllabus there to CBSE in Hyderabad for our two kids. But the school principal and teachers put us at ease and gave us a roadmap on how the kids will improve in all subjects over the next 3-4 years. That's exactly what happened.

The kids have come up very well and the elder one scored well in the board exams too. All thanks to the constant encouragement and skills of the experienced teachers.

Apart from the curriculum, the school puts good emphasis on all round development- including sports, hobbies and leadership skills.

Truly appreciate the school, it's teachers, principal and the management. Well done and wish you continue doing great service to the community.

reviews.author: rohit anand
reviews.review_body:
We are happy with Global Edge. Our child always gets ample opportunities to explore and progress in all aspects. The school has been successful in striking an appropriate balance between Academic and Co-Curricular activities.
I would also like to take this opportunity to thank all the teachers for the efforts they are putting together to teach my child. Best of luck Global Edge.

reviews.author: Rajeevan Reddy
reviews.review_body: Great school indeed, good administration makes the difference !!
